# Input

`subgraph.input` · Utility

Marks a field a subgraph takes in: each one becomes an input port on the container.

## Purpose

Marks a field a subgraph takes in. Placed inside a subgraph, each Input node becomes an input port on the containing Subgraph node.

## Inputs

This node takes no inputs.

## Outputs

- `out`

## Parameters

This node has no parameters.

## Layer contract

Reads and writes the height layer.
